name: python3-simplejson
title: python3-simplejson
summary: simple, fast, extensible JSON encoder/decoder for Python 3.x
description:
simple, fast, extensible JSON encoder/decoder for Python 3.x
simplejson is a simple, fast, complete, correct and extensible JSON
<http://json.org> encoder and decoder.
.
The encoder may be subclassed to provide serialization in any kind of
situation, without any special support by the objects to be serialized
(somewhat like pickle).
.
The decoder can handle incoming JSON strings of any specified encoding
(UTF-8 by default).
.
simplejson is the externally maintained development version of the json
library included with Python 2.6 and Python 3.0, but maintains backwards
compatibility with Python 2.5.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-simplejson because simple, fast, extensible JSON encoder/decoder for Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-simplejson as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-simplejson with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-simplejson --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
